parameters.jsCode:
const month = new Date().getMonth() + 1;
const alerts = {
  3: { season: 'Spring', msg: '🌱 SPRING SEASON STARTING
• Launch spring cleanup campaigns
• Update website seasonal messaging
• Email all customers about spring packages
• Check and restock equipment' },
  5: { season: 'Peak Summer', msg: '☀️ PEAK MOWING SEASON
• Ensure all crews staffed
• Restock yard signs and door hangers
• Push fertilization and herbicide upsells
• Monitor crew scheduling' },
  9: { season: 'Fall', msg: '🍂 FALL TRANSITION
• Start fall cleanup + aeration campaigns
• Push leaf removal messaging
• Prepare gutter cleaning promos
• Begin snow removal contract outreach' },
  11: { season: 'Snow', msg: '❄️ SNOW SEASON
• Activate snow removal contracts
• Update emergency response protocols
• SMS all snow customers with service reminder
• Stock salt and snow equipment' },
  2: { season: 'Pre-Spring', msg: '📅 PRE-SPRING
• Begin spring nurture email campaign
• Start booking spring cleanups early
• Update pricing for new season' }
};
const alert = alerts[month] || { season: 'Monthly', msg: `Monthly check-in (Month ${month}). Review marketing calendar and upcoming seasonal needs.` };
return [{ json: { ...alert, month } }];
